title: New ores & Equipments
description: This mod adds new ores, weapons, tools, items, and a lot new things!
body:
This mod is in current development and new versions will come soon, first version contains a new ore: Silver. 

This my first mod and i will try to do my best, new version coming in a few days.

 

If you found a bug or a problem into the mod, please leave a comment reporting it, so i can get noticed and try to fix it on the next update.

If you wanna support me with a donation, just click on the "Buy Me a Coffe" button, i will really apreciate it :D

 

New ores added in First Beta update:

-Silver

Min. Gen. height: 13   Max. Gen. height 33

Iron Pickaxe needed to mine the silver ore block.

Armor and tools can be crafted with silver ingots.

Silver Helmet: +3 Armor

Silver Chestplate: +7 Armor

Silver Leggins: +6 Armor

Silver Boots: +2 Armor

 

Beta 1.0.1:

Silver sword: Attack damage +6.5

All silver tools has 6.5 efficiency points.

All silver tools has 850 uses.

 

Beta 1.0.2:

New ores added in this update:

-Platinum

Min. Gen. Height: 0    Max. Gen. Height: 13

 

Diamond Pickaxe needed to mine the platinum ore block.

Armor can be crafted with Platinum Ingots.

Platinum Helmet: +4

Platinum Chestplate: +9

Platinum Leggins: +7

Platinum Boots: +4

-Uranium
Min. Gen. Height: -30  Max. Gen. Height: 0

Uranium Guide:
